data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding due date and request lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for due date and request lifecycle (open/fulfilled/declined/expired). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that confirm the presence of these lifecycle states or due dates for the requests. The prior steps do not provide concrete evidence of the request lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of due date and request lifecycle states being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the due date and request lifecycle.
